benefits: Schrankia confusa, also known as the butterfly pea, has been traditionally used in various cultures for its potential health benefits. intro: Schrankia confusa, also known as the confused moth plant, is a plant species that belongs to the family Fabaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in medicine to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The bioactive constituents of Schrankia confusa include flavonoids, alkaloids, and saponins, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In traditional medicine, Schrankia confusa is often used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are used to treat various health conditions.
